history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A studio portrait of three Indonesian male teenagers dressed in school uniforms. The uniforms consist of white short-sleeved shirts with emblems on the chest and light blue trousers. The teenager on the left is sitting on a white cube, wearing a striped maroon and white tie, with his hands resting on his lap and one arm extended. The teenager in the middle is sitting on a metal stool, wearing sunglasses and a blue baseball cap, with his hands adjusting his sunglasses. The teenager on the right is standing behind the other two, with his hands behind his head, looking towards the camera. The background is a plain, light-colored studio backdrop. The lighting is soft and even, creating a bright and clean atmosphere. The overall mood is youthful, confident, and slightly playful. The color palette is dominated by the white of the shirts, the blue of the trousers, and the maroon of the tie, against a neutral background. The style is a realistic studio photograph.
